changelog: Provisioning: sanitize UUIDs for security group / network / project config options; reject WHMCS placeholders like 'error'
Provisioning: volume_type sanitizer rejects numeric values so a stray disk size cannot be sent as volume_type
Provisioning: billing period validated against {monthly, hourly}; IP version against {ipv4, ipv6, both}
Provisioning: region resolution prefers the flavor's saved region over the admin default region
API: createInstance now forwards region_id, network_id, and ip_version when set
API: listProjects accepts an optional regionId filter
Admin: global Server + Region selector shared across all tabs
Admin: Images / Flavors tabs load from the currently selected region only (previously iterated every region)
Admin: Additional tab reloads projects when the region changes
Admin: row numbers only count visible rows after region filtering
